infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Salonin uses your location to show nearby beauty professionals and salons in your area.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Salonin needs camera access to upload your profile photo and portfolio images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Salonin needs photo library access to choose your profile and portfolio images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Salonin saves your portfolio images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Salonin sends notifications when salons message you or post new job opportunities.
